svg.title: Sheet Music for "Fisher's Hornpipe (F)"

text.tspan: F/Bb F/Bb F/Bb F/C | C· F C C | F Bb F C
F/Bb F/Bb C ·· F · | Bb F C F | Bb F C F
Notes: This is commonly played in either D or F major. Here's the F version as I learned it, along
with a nice variation on the A-part I found at https://thesession.org/tunes/872.
